user.description: Configure NordPool all-in price calculation. See the [documentation]({documentation_url}) for help.

data_description.nordpool_entity_id: Select the NordPool sensor that provides hourly spot prices.
data_description.import_formula: Jinja2 template. Available variables: `price` (spot price as float) and `datetime` (slot start as datetime object). Must evaluate to a number.
data_description.export_formula: Jinja2 template. Available variables: `price` (spot price as float) and `datetime` (slot start as datetime object). Must evaluate to a number.

reconfigure.description: Update the NordPool entity or price formulas.

error.entity_not_found: The selected entity does not exist. Make sure the NordPool integration is configured.
error.entity_unavailable: The selected entity is currently unavailable. Try again when it comes online.
error.entity_invalid: The selected entity does not contain NordPool price data (expected raw_today or prices_today attribute).
error.formula_invalid: One or more formulas are invalid or do not evaluate to a number.

abort.already_configured: This NordPool entity is already configured.

init.description: Update the import and export price formulas.
